ContainerGroupDefinition.description: The properties of the requested container group definition resource.

LocationalDeployments.description: If the deployment is for a multi-location fleet, the requests returns the deployment status in each fleet location.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

LocationAttributes.description: Location-specific information on the requested fleet's remote locations.

FleetCapacity.description: Resource capacity information for the requested fleet location. Capacity objects are returned only for fleets and locations that currently exist. Changes in desired instance value can take up to 1 minute to be reflected.

FleetUtilization.description: Utilization information for the requested fleet location. Utilization objects are returned only for fleets and locations that currently exist.

FleetId.description: A unique identifier for the fleet that was requested.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

InboundPermissions.description: The port settings for the requested fleet ID.

UpdateStatus.description: The current status of updates to the fleet's port settings in the requested fleet location. A status of PENDING_UPDATE indicates that an update was requested for the fleet but has not yet been completed for the location.

Location.description: The requested fleet location, expressed as an Amazon Web Services Region code, such as us-west-2.

ComputeName.description: The identifier of the compute resource to be accessed. This value might be either a compute name or an instance ID.

Credentials.description: A set of temporary Amazon Web Services credentials for use when connecting to the compute resource with Amazon EC2 Systems Manager (SSM).

Target.description: The instance ID where the compute resource is running.

ContainerIdentifiers.description: For a managed container fleet, a list of containers on the compute. Use the container runtime ID with Docker commands to connect to a specific container.

FleetId.description: A unique identifier for the fleet that the compute is registered to.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

ComputeName.description: The name of the compute resource that the authentication token is issued to.

ComputeArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to an Amazon GameLift Servers compute resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::compute/compute-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

ExpirationTimestamp.description: The amount of time until the authentication token is no longer valid.

PreSignedUrl.description: Location of the requested game session logs, available for download. This URL is valid for 15 minutes, after which S3 will reject any download request using this URL. You can request a new URL any time within the 14-day period that the logs are retained.

InstanceAccess.description: The connection information for a fleet instance, including IP address and access credentials.

ComputeList.description: A list of compute resources in the specified fleet.
